body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, here is the weekly pothole summary. Crew patched {NUM} locations this week, concentrated on {STREET} between {CROSS} and the western village limit. We used approximately {NUM} tons of cold mix. Three complaints from the 311 queue were addressed; {NUM} remain open, mostly on {STREET}. Weather permitting, we will shift to hot-mix operations starting {DATE}. Let me know if you want me to prioritize any specific corridors before the council meeting.
reply_tmpl: Frank, good numbers. Please make sure {STREET} is cleared before {DATE} — I have a ribbon-cutting out there. Thanks.

body_tmpl: Mayor — overnight storm dropped {NUM} inches on the village. All {NUM} plow routes were activated at {TIME}. Primary arterials including Mannheim Rd, St. Charles Rd, and 25th Ave are clear. Residential passes are {NUM}% complete. Salt inventory is at {NUM} tons; I will have a resupply truck in on {DATE}. Two trucks were pulled briefly for mechanical issues but are back in service. No accidents or equipment damage to report. Crew will continue rotating shifts through the afternoon.

Karen, attached is the draft capital paving schedule for this season. Priority segments are {STREET} ({NUM} linear feet), {CROSS} from Washington Blvd to 25th Ave, and the alley behind {ADDRESS}. Total estimated cost is {AMOUNT}. Contractor mobilization is tentatively {DATE}, subject to IDOT coordination on the Mannheim Rd utility conflict. Please let me know if the finance office needs any line-item detail before the next budget review.
reply_tmpl: Frank, David Okafor will need the itemized breakdown by {DATE}. Please send to him directly and copy me.

subject_tmpl: Equipment Request — Additional Patch Truck for {STREET} Project
body_tmpl: Tom, to stay on schedule with the {STREET} mill-and-overlay we need a second patch truck starting {DATE}. Can you confirm whether the rental from last season's contractor is still available, or should I go to bid? The segment between {CROSS} and {STREET} is roughly {NUM} blocks and I want to knock it out in one mobilization. Let me know your recommendation by end of week so I can get paperwork moving.
reply_tmpl: Frank — rental is available. I will send the specs to your office today. Confirm with Verdi Excavating on their equipment calendar.

subject_tmpl: Grant Application — CMAP Surface Transportation Program, {DATE} Cycle
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I have completed the draft application for the CMAP Surface Transportation Program grant. The proposed project is reconstruction of {STREET} from {CROSS} to {CROSS}, estimated at {AMOUNT}. The federal share would be 80%, with a village match of {AMOUNT}. Submission deadline is {DATE}. I need your signature on the resolution of authorization before {DATE}. Yolanda Pierce has the resolution language ready for the next council agenda. Please advise if you have questions.
reply_tmpl: Tom, I will sign before {DATE}. Coordinate with Tina on my calendar. Good work pulling this together.

body_tmpl: Lorena, heads up that we had an emergency main break on {STREET} at {CROSS} yesterday evening. Repair was completed at {TIME}. Service was restored to all affected addresses by {TIME}. The break affected accounts in the {CROSS} block; you may see elevated usage spikes on those meters for the next billing cycle — please flag them for review before sending shutoff notices. I will have the repair report to you by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Got it, Frank. I will put a hold on those accounts. Send me the address list when you have it.

body_tmpl: Tom, our crew flagged two additional leak points on the {STREET} main between {CROSS} and {CROSS} this week — that is the third incident in {DAYS} days. I think we are looking at a full main replacement rather than continued spot repairs. Can you pull the GIS records and give me an age estimate on that segment? I want to make a case to Karen for including it in the {DATE} capital budget before the deadline.

Frank, I completed the CCTV inspection of the {STREET} storm sewer basin last week. Results show significant root intrusion at {NUM} joints near {ADDRESS} and partial collapse at the {CROSS} inlet. I recommend we schedule lining on the root-intrusion segments and full replacement of the collapsed section before spring rains. Combined cost estimate is {AMOUNT}. I can have a full memo to Karen and the Mayor by {DATE} if you want to move this to the next infrastructure meeting.
reply_tmpl: Tom, let's do it. Get the memo out by {DATE} so Karen can add it to the agenda.

body_tmpl: Mayor, following last night's {NUM}-inch rainfall, we had standing water reports on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. Crew was on scene by {TIME} and confirmed the storm inlet at {ADDRESS} was blocked with debris. Inlet was cleared at {TIME} and water receded within an hour. No property damage reported. We will add that inlet to the weekly inspection list. Resident {NAME} at {ADDRESS} may call your office — I spoke with them on site.

subject_tmpl: MWRD Green Infrastructure Grant — Letter of Intent Due {DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen, the Metropolitan Water Reclamation District has a green infrastructure grant cycle closing {DATE}. I believe the bioswale project along {STREET} near {CROSS} would be a strong candidate — it addresses the chronic inlet flooding we have documented and aligns with our MS4 obligations. Eligible costs are up to {AMOUNT} with a 50% local match. I need authorization to submit a letter of intent by {DATE}. Can we get on the Mayor's calendar this week to discuss?
reply_tmpl: Tom, I will set the meeting. Put together a one-page summary for the Mayor before {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Snow Salt Inventory — Resupply Authorization Needed
body_tmpl: Karen, current salt inventory is at {NUM} tons, which is below our {NUM}-ton minimum threshold. Given the forecast for the week of {DATE}, I need purchasing authorization to order an additional {NUM} tons from the state contract vendor. Cost will be approximately {AMOUNT}. Our budget has {AMOUNT} remaining in the materials line. Please advise or forward to David if finance approval is needed.
reply_tmpl: Frank, you are approved. Copy David on the PO. Order today.

body_tmpl: Good morning Mayor. Today's crew status: {NUM} staff on roads, {NUM} on utilities, {NUM} on parks. We are continuing pothole repair on {STREET} and expect to complete that block today. The water valve replacement at {ADDRESS} is on hold pending delivery of the {NUM}-inch valve; ETA from supplier is {DATE}. No safety incidents to report. I am in the yard until {TIME} then at the {STREET} job site if you need to reach me.

Tom, before I finalize next year's paving priority list I need updated PCI scores for the {STREET} to {CROSS} corridor. Last assessment was {DATE} and conditions have deteriorated noticeably. Can your office conduct or contract a drive-through rating by {DATE}? I also need the scores for {STREET} and {CROSS} if those are current. Let me know what you need from my side to get started.

subject_tmpl: Contractor Schedule Confirmation — Verdi Excavating, {STREET} Resurfacing
body_tmpl: Frank, I heard back from Verdi Excavating. They can mobilize on {STREET} starting {DATE}, weather permitting. They will need {DAYS} calendar days for the mill-and-overlay between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. Traffic control submittals are due to me by {DATE}. I will notify IDOT for the Mannheim Rd detour coordination. Please confirm your crew can handle utility mark-outs the week before mobilization.
reply_tmpl: Confirmed. I will have mark-outs done by {DATE}. Who is the Verdi site super?

subject_tmpl: Snow Plow Deployment Plan — Season Preview
body_tmpl: Mayor, ahead of the winter season I want to share our snow operations plan. We have {NUM} plow trucks plus {NUM} salt spreaders ready. Routes have been reorganized this year to shorten response time on the residential grid east of {STREET}. Target is arterials clear within {NUM} hours and all residentials within {NUM} hours of storm end. We will hire {NUM} seasonal operators starting {DATE}. I can present the full plan at the pre-council work session if helpful.
reply_tmpl: Please plan on {NUM} minutes at the {DATE} work session. Send me a one-page overview before then.

subject_tmpl: IDOT Coordination Update — Mannheim Rd Utility Conflict
body_tmpl: Mayor, I met with IDOT District 1 staff on {DATE} regarding the Mannheim Rd utility conflict affecting our {STREET} paving project. IDOT has agreed to delay their resurfacing by {DAYS} days to let us relocate the conflicting water main first. That puts our contractor mobilization at {DATE}. There is no cost impact to the village; IDOT will handle their own lane-closure coordination. I will keep you updated as the schedule firms up.

Frank, our billing system flagged account {ACCT} at {ADDRESS} for unusually high consumption — {NUM} gallons this cycle versus the normal {NUM}. Before I send a high-usage notice to the customer, can you check whether there was any main work or hydrant flushing near {STREET} and {CROSS} during the billing period? I want to rule out a meter anomaly or service-line issue on our end. Let me know what you find and I will adjust the bill accordingly if needed.
reply_tmpl: Lorena, no work at that intersection. Sounds like a customer-side leak. Go ahead and send the notice with the leak-adjustment form.

subject_tmpl: Water Main Repair Cost — Reimbursement Request, {DATE}
body_tmpl: David, the emergency water main repair on {STREET} on {DATE} came in at {AMOUNT} — labor, materials, and equipment rental. This was not in the operating budget line so I need to request a transfer from the water fund reserve. Please let me know what documentation you need. I have crew time sheets and vendor invoices ready. Rosa Marchetti's office was notified about the service disruption at the adjacent property at {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Frank, please submit the invoices to AP with the emergency work order number. I will process the fund transfer this week.

body_tmpl: Mayor, the spring bulk pickup schedule is set. Crews will run {STREET}-side of the village the week of {DATE} and {CROSS}-side the following week. Residents were notified via the village newsletter and website. We are contracting overflow with the county for items we cannot take in-house. Estimated cost is {AMOUNT}, which is within the approved budget. I will send you a recap after the first week.

subject_tmpl: Refuse Truck Replacement — Capital Request FY{DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen, I am submitting a capital request to replace truck #7, a {DATE}-model rear-loader with {NUM} miles. Maintenance costs last year were {AMOUNT} — double the fleet average. A replacement vehicle on the state contract is {AMOUNT}. The truck averages {NUM} service days per week so the operational risk of another breakdown on a collection day is significant. I would like to include this in the FY capital budget discussion. Let me know if you need the maintenance records.
reply_tmpl: Frank, include the maintenance log with your capital submission. Finance will review before the budget workshop on {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood Setup — PW Support Confirmed for {DATE}
body_tmpl: Kevin, public works is confirmed for Taste of Bellwood setup on {DATE}. We will have {NUM} crew members on site at {TIME} for barricade placement, electrical hookups at the vendor tent areas, and portable restroom delivery. Breakdown crew will be on site at {TIME} on {DATE}. Please send me the final vendor layout by {DATE} so I can plan the power drops. Let me know if you need anything else from our side.
reply_tmpl: Frank, layout is attached. Can you also bring the extra picnic tables from the yard? We need {NUM} more than last year.

subject_tmpl: Park Irrigation Line — Repair Needed Before {DATE} Season Opener
body_tmpl: Frank, the irrigation line on the east side of {STREET} park has a confirmed break near the concession building. The landscaping contractor found it during their spring walkthrough and said it is a PW responsibility since it ties into the village water main. Can you get a crew out before {DATE}? The summer season opener is {DATE} and we need irrigation working for the turf to recover in time. Let me know if you need the contractor's report.
reply_tmpl: Kevin, I can get someone out {DATE}. Send me the contractor report and mark the location on the site map.

subject_tmpl: Alley Obstruction — {ADDRESS}, Request for PW Removal
body_tmpl: Frank, I have an active code case ({CASE}) at {ADDRESS} for alley obstruction. The resident has not complied after {DAYS} days and the deadline has passed. The material blocking the alley includes construction debris and a broken appliance. Code has issued the maximum administrative notices. Can PW remove the debris and bill the owner? I will coordinate with Yolanda on the cost recovery lien process. Please let me know your availability so I can notify the property owner of the removal date.
reply_tmpl: Sandra, we can do removal on {DATE}. Have the Village Attorney sign off on the work order first. Copy me on the lien paperwork.

body_tmpl: Sandra, my crew flagged an overgrown lot abutting the right-of-way on {STREET} near {CROSS}. The vegetation is encroaching onto the sidewalk and is a visibility issue at the intersection. This appears to be a private parcel at {ADDRESS}. I am referring to code for the proper notice process. We can trim the right-of-way side ourselves but the private property overgrowth needs an enforcement action. Case reference from my side is PW-{CASE}.

Frank, we have a driveway apron permit pending for {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The applicant wants to widen the apron to {NUM} feet. Before I approve, I need PW sign-off confirming there are no utility conflicts and the proposed width meets village standards for that block face. The parcel is between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. Can you review and send me your written concurrence or objection by {DATE}? Permit number is {CASE}.
reply_tmpl: Rosa, I checked the records. No conflicts, and {NUM} feet is acceptable on that block. You are clear to approve.

body_tmpl: Rosa, I completed stormwater review for permit {CASE} at {ADDRESS}. The proposed impervious area increase of {NUM} square feet triggers our detention ordinance. The applicant's engineer has submitted a detention analysis, but the release rate used does not match the Bellwood standard — they used {NUM} cfs per acre instead of the required {NUM}. Please put the permit on hold and request a revised drainage report. I am happy to speak with the applicant's engineer directly if that helps move things along.
reply_tmpl: Tom, I am placing the permit on hold today. Can you send me the standard detention criteria document so I can attach it to the deficiency letter?

body_tmpl: Reggie, we will be paving on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} starting {DATE}. The work will require a full lane closure from {TIME} to {TIME} daily. We will handle our own barricades and signs, but we could use PD presence for about two hours at the start of each day to help establish traffic pattern changes, especially at the {CROSS} intersection. Can you check if that is feasible with your staffing? This runs {DAYS} days.
reply_tmpl: Frank, I can put an officer out there {TIME} to {TIME} each morning. Confirm the start date when it is locked in.

body_tmpl: Frank, the Mayor's office received a complaint from {NAME} at {ADDRESS} about ongoing deterioration on {STREET} near {CROSS}. They describe multiple large potholes causing vehicle damage and say they have called 311 twice without follow-up. The Mayor would like a status update by {DATE} so we can respond to the constituent. Please let me know what is scheduled for that block and I will draft a reply.
reply_tmpl: Tina, that block is on the schedule for the week of {DATE}. We had to push it due to the equipment issue but it is confirmed now. You can tell {NAME} work begins {DATE}.

body_tmpl: David, the {DATE} snow event required {NUM} hours of overtime across {NUM} plow operators and {NUM} equipment operators. Total overtime cost is estimated at {AMOUNT}. This is within the snow operations contingency line. I am documenting it here per the overtime pre-approval protocol and will submit the signed time sheets to payroll by {DATE}. Let me know if you need anything else for the record.

Frank, I received ComEd's response to our outage ticket for the {NUM} lights on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}. They are attributing the failure to a cable fault in our conduit, not their equipment, which means the repair is on us. Estimated repair cost per their assessment is {AMOUNT}. I would recommend we get a second quote. The outage has been dark since {DATE}, which is a liability concern. Can you arrange an inspection this week?
reply_tmpl: Tom, I will send someone out {DATE}. I know a reliable electrical sub we have used before — I will get a quote.

body_tmpl: Tom, here is the quarterly catch basin cleaning summary. Crew cleaned {NUM} basins village-wide. We identified {NUM} basins with structural issues requiring repair — locations are logged in the GIS system under work order {CASE}. The heaviest sediment loads were on {STREET} and the {CROSS}/{STREET} intersection, consistent with last year. We disposed of {NUM} cubic yards of material at the county facility. Let me know if you need this data for the MS4 annual report.
reply_tmpl: Frank, I do need it for the MS4 report — can you export the GIS log to PDF and email it to me by {DATE}?

body_tmpl: Mayor, mid-season update on the capital paving program: we have completed {NUM} of the {NUM} planned lane-miles. {STREET} and {CROSS} are done and received positive feedback from residents. Currently working on {STREET} — Verdi expects to finish that segment by {DATE}. The {STREET} segment may need to slip to next season due to the IDOT utility delay; Tom Reyes is monitoring that. Overall we are on budget. I will have a final season report ready by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Hydrant Flushing Program — Schedule and Notification Plan
body_tmpl: Mayor, the annual hydrant flushing program runs {DATE} through {DATE}. We will flush all {NUM} hydrants on the system over {DAYS} days, working zone by zone. Lorena Diaz is coordinating customer notification letters for each zone {DAYS} days before flushing. Residents may see discolored water for a few hours — we will post on the village social media each morning with the day's zone. Fire shift commander has the hydrant list for any emergency conflicts. Let me know if you want the zone map.
reply_tmpl: Frank, yes please send the zone map. And make sure the notification letters go out on time — I do not want complaints about rusty water without warning.

body_tmpl: Karen, I need to report a minor accident involving PW truck #12 on {DATE} at approximately {TIME} on {STREET} near {CROSS}. No injuries. The truck sustained damage to the rear bumper estimated at {AMOUNT}. The other vehicle had minor damage; driver information exchanged. Village insurance has been notified under claim number {CASE}. The driver has been placed on light duty pending review per our vehicle policy. I am preparing the full incident report and will have it to you and the Village Attorney by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Sidewalk ADA Compliance Audit — Findings Summary
body_tmpl: Karen, I have completed the preliminary ADA sidewalk audit for the {STREET} and {CROSS} commercial corridors. We identified {NUM} non-compliant curb ramps and {NUM} sections of heaved or broken sidewalk that fail accessibility standards. Correcting the highest-priority items is estimated at {AMOUNT}. Some of the heaving is caused by tree roots — Parks and PW will need to coordinate on a combined repair and tree management approach. I recommend we include a line item in the next capital plan. Full report is available upon request.
reply_tmpl: Tom, please send the full report to me and copy Frank DiMeo and Kevin O'Brien. I want to discuss at the {DATE} department head meeting.
